headline: Hero video is fatigued, not mistargeted — CTR halved while frequency climbed 55%.

clusters.why: Live unchanged 5 weeks; CTR -50% tracks 1:1 with frequency +55% (4.8). Classic fatigue curve, not a cold-audience miss. Well past the 1,000-impression judging floor.
Above account CTR even as video collapses; the durable, fatigue-resistant performer. Pattern, not a one-off ad.
Competitor B is pushing the same cooling angle hard in video — message is now crowded; click intent likely diluted by a louder competitor, compounding seasonal softness.

spec_hygiene: No running headline over Meta/Google limits; spec issue is not the problem.
pattern_read: The winning pattern is the static before/after; the losing pattern is a single aging video carrying too much of prospecting reach.
source: ad-creative / Iterating from Performance Data (Analyze Winners + Analyze Losers, ad-fatigue caveat)
